channel.title: Journal für die reine und angewandte Mathematik
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal für die reine und angewandte Mathematik

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by András I. Stipsicz, Zoltán Szabó DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-frontmatter817

item.title: Ordinary modules for vertex algebras of 𝔬𝔰𝔭1|2𝑛
item.description: Article by András I. Stipsicz, Zoltán Szabó DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0060

item.title: Morse index bound of simple closed geodesics on 2-spheres and strong Morse inequalities
item.description: Article by András I. Stipsicz, Zoltán Szabó DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0065

item.title: Flows of geometric structures
item.description: Article by András I. Stipsicz, Zoltán Szabó DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0067

item.title: Degenerations of complete collineations and geometric Tevelev degrees of ℙ𝑟
item.description: Article by András I. Stipsicz, Zoltán Szabó DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0068

item.title: Lipschitz regularity of sub-elliptic harmonic maps into CAT(0) space
item.description: Article by András I. Stipsicz, Zoltán Szabó DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0066

item.title: On manifolds with nonnegative Ricci curvature and the infimum of volume growth order < 2
item.description: Article by András I. Stipsicz, Zoltán Szabó DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0078

item.title: A geometric approach to apriori estimates for optimal transport maps
item.description: Article by András I. Stipsicz, Zoltán Szabó DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0071

item.title: Definite four-manifolds with exotic smooth structures
item.description: Article by András I. Stipsicz, Zoltán Szabó DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0072
